title: Call to Battle Ammo Boxes Addon
description: Adds craftable ammo boxes for inventory management to Call to Battle WW2, the World War II experience for Minecraft.
body:
![Call to Battle WW2 Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7574e3821ff263123d2332039a6abcd485bc0e9f.png)

This addon adds ammo boxes to Call to Battle, allowing you to better manage your inventory space in survival!

**Don't have Call to Battle? It's a massive World War II conversion mod! Get it here:**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-to-battle-ww2)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/567b4066ce706dc81c95a21a12fa402b02b88a7a.png)

The Ammo Boxes addon adds ammo boxes for multiple types of ammo such as 9mm, .30-06, 7.62x54mmR, and more! 

In the future, the goal is to have an ammo box for every type of ammo in Call to Battle.

## How does it work?

Ammo and paper can be crafted together into an ammo box using the Call to Battle crafting station. These ammo boxes can be stacked and save a lot of space in your inventory in comparison to loose rounds.

When you need to more ammo to reload your guns, hold right click on the ammo box and it will disperse the rounds into your inventory!
